title: Freedom Day Soccer tournament
description: The Freedom Day Sports Against Crime Soccer...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gallery","html":"Gallery"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Freedom Day Sports Against Crime Soccer Tournament took place at the Extension 23 sports grounds in KwaNonqaba on Saturday, 27 April.","html":"The Freedom Day Sports Against Crime Soccer Tournament took place at the Extension 23 sports grounds in KwaNonqaba on Saturday, 27 April."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It was well attended.","html":"It was well attended."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It was organised by the KwaNonqaba Community Policing Forum in conjunction with the KwaNonqaba Police Station.","html":"It was organised by the KwaNonqaba Community Policing Forum in conjunction with the KwaNonqaba Police Station."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"See a gallery here: https://tinyurl.com/2s3v7phn:","html":"See a gallery here: https://tinyurl.com/2s3v7phn:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
